title: Anno Spills a Moderate Quantity of Beans in a 400 Page Book
display_title: Anno Spills a Moderate Quantity of Beans in a 400 Page Book
wikitext:
[]: Anno Spills a Moderate Quantity of Beans in a 400-Page Book!             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Jan 21, 2008 9:22 pm Anime News Network wrote: The official Evangelion website has also announced that Gainax will release a 400-page Complete Records Collection. The hardcover book will include a long interview with director Hideaki Anno, a pictorial digest of the film with frames and dialogue from every scene, music cue sheets, transcriptions of background dialogue, reproductions of the production designs, a conceptual art collection, interviews with 28 staffers, and reproductions of the films' posters and other promotional material. The limited first printing will also bundle a filmstrip, as well as two books that reproduce the film's 500-page storyboard. Gainax has not set the price for the Complete Records Collection yet.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jan 21, 2008 9:42 pm HOLY SHIT! DO WANT! (Though my Japanese sucks.)

[]:             Quote Post by kasuturo » Mon Jan 21, 2008 9:46 pm Me Wantz!!!! I'll exchange the secret of true happiness for it!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 21, 2008 9:56 pm I bet half of the storyboard content is just copy and paste from NGE. Sounds like Gainax is going to be coercing me out of yet more of my cash.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Jan 21, 2008 10:39 pm Reichu wrote: Sounds l¡ke Ga¡nax ¡s go¡ng to be coerc¡ng me to translate a lengthy ¡nterv¡ew.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 21, 2008 10:41 pm I can't translate interviews, sadly. The kind of language used goes way beyond my capacities. I've tried before and failed miserably. I'm also wondering where the hell I'm going to find the money to buy more worthless Eva crap.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Jan 21, 2008 10:43 pm Reichu wrote: I can't translate interviews, sadly. It looks like I'm going to have to force myself to learn perfect Japanese by the end of April so that I can translate this interview for you guys at my own expense.

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Tue Jan 22, 2008 12:30 pm two books that reproduce the film's 500-page storyboard

[]:             Quote Post by Colette » Wed Jan 23, 2008 4:52 pm I hope it come to America, but I don't know, the Red Cross Book never came...

[]:             Quote Post by kasuturo » Wed Jan 23, 2008 5:23 pm Colette wrote: I hope it come to America, but I don't know, the Red Cross Book never came...

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Wed Jan 23, 2008 5:51 pm Do you know how many people id kill to get that !!!!!! neither do i but id probubly need an eva lol

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Jan 23, 2008 6:59 pm kasuturo wrote: Colette wrote: I hope it come to America, but I don't know, the Red Cross Book never came...

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Jan 24, 2008 11:29 am Luckily we have few Japanese members in these boards...?

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Thu Jan 24, 2008 12:57 pm gee I hope this gets translated at some point.

[]:             Quote Post by BLACKANGEL32076 » Tue Jan 29, 2008 7:49 pm Defectron wrote: gee I hope this gets translated at some point.

[]:             Quote Post by usagiko » Sat Feb 23, 2008 10:41 am Oh man. I am SO excited about this, it's not even funny.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Tue Feb 26, 2008 1:33 pm Translation problem? That is why I am here damn it.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Feb 26, 2008 1:40 pm Yatta! Can't wait for this :)

[]: Time for this...             Quote Post by XX » Sun Mar 30, 2008 4:45 pm ヱヴァ序全記録全集のエヴァストア特典！- GAINAX Official Blog 通販最新情報ブログ http://gainax.weblogs.jp/staff/2008/03/post-ea95.html _____ 30/3/08 GMT -- · Eva New Movie Prologue All Collection Yen Price: 10,000 (Merchandise Only). []:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Mar 30, 2008 4:52 pm This will be the Eva Bible. (That only the chosen will be able to read.) It'll suck if when we get it and read it, all the "spoilers" is stuff we already figured out. But it'll still be worth it.
